subcodes.first_line: O Khavar! Convey thou unto His honour Mulla Muhammad, on behalf of this Wronged One, greetings of exaltation, and say: The sweet fragrances of thy love have wafted unto the court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خاور جناب ملا محمد را از جانب مظلوم تکبیر برسان بگو نفحات محبت تو بساحت
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for protection, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
